role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and remained neutral.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, soil, and climate cues (high-altitude plateau, basaltic soil).
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed vegetation types (montane grassland, scrub) and biome analogs.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road infrastructure (asphalt quality, lack of signage) and building materials.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain evidence (architecture + landscape) to distinguish between Southern African candidates.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the ground truth (Lesotho) by leveraging the distinctive architectural marker (rondavels) and high-altitude landscape to distinguish it from the primary competitor (South Africa). The agents adhered strictly to their domains, and the tournament logic was sound.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of rolling grassy mountains and basaltic soil match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of montane grassland and sparse shrubs match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of basic asphalt and concrete blocks match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Descriptions of rondavels and rural infrastructure match the image.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The pipeline correctly predicted the ground truth (Lesotho).
